summary: Wallet access for all user types feature verified. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows verified - admin can access /my-wallet page, wallet link visible in account menu.
critical_code_review_comments: wallet.py: Correctly removed user_type == 'buyer' restrictions from /topup/request, /topup/history, /topup/verify endpoints
BuyerWalletPage.js: Correctly allows all authenticated users (only checks if user exists)
MobileNav.js: Wallet link correctly shown for ALL users in account menu (lines 301-315)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wallet access for all user types feature verified. The fix correctly: 1) Removed buyer-only restrictions from wallet APIs in backend/routes/wallet.py 2) BuyerWalletPage.js allows all authenticated users 3) MobileNav.js shows wallet link for all users. Admin tested successfully - can access /my-wallet, see balance, and topup button. Wallet link visible in account menu.

backend_api.GET /api/wallet/balance (admin): ✅ PASSED - Returns wallet balance for admin user
backend_api.POST /api/wallet/topup/request (admin): ✅ PASSED - Admin can create topup request
backend_api.GET /api/wallet/topup/history (admin): ✅ PASSED - Admin can view topup history
backend_api.Wallet balance structure: ✅ PASSED - Contains balance, user_id, user_type fields
backend_api.Topup validation (min amount): ✅ PASSED - Rejects amount below 100 SYP minimum

frontend_ui.Wallet balance display: ✅ VERIFIED - Balance shown as '٠ ل.س' (0 SYP)
frontend_ui.Wallet link in account menu: ✅ VERIFIED - 'محفظتي' link visible with subtitle 'اشحن واستخدم للدفع'

feature_verification.original_requirement: All user types (seller, food_seller, delivery, admin) should be able to access wallet page and use wallet for purchases like regular customers
feature_verification.implementation_status: VERIFIED - Wallet APIs and UI accessible to all authenticated users
key_changes_verified: Backend wallet.py: No user_type restrictions on topup APIs
Frontend BuyerWalletPage.js: Only checks if user is authenticated
Frontend MobileNav.js: Wallet link shown for all users in account menu
